message: docs: rebuild CHANGELOG.md from git history with live commit links

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 All notable changes to the **beads-for-frankentui** repository are documented here.
 
-This repo is a [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) (`bv`) static-site deployment that publishes an interactive dashboard for the FrankenTUI project's issue tracker. Each deployment is generated by `bv --pages`, which snapshots the beads SQLite database, pre-computes graph layouts and triage data, bundles a fully self-contained single-page app (sql.js WASM, force-graph, Chart.js, Mermaid, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS), and pushes the result to this repo for GitHub Pages hosting.
+This repo is a [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) (`bv`) static-site deployment that publishes an interactive dashboard for the FrankenTUI project's issue tracker. Each deployment is generated by `bv --pages`, which snapshots the beads SQLite database, pre-computes graph layouts and triage data, bundles a fully self-contained single-page application (sql.js WASM, force-graph, Chart.js, Mermaid, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS), and pushes the result to this repo for GitHub Pages hosting.
 
 **Live dashboard:** <https://Dicklesworthstone.github.io/beads-for-frankentui/>

-### What changed
+### Issue composition
+
+| Type | Previous | This deploy | Delta |
+|------|----------|-------------|-------|
+| Tasks | 1,327 | 2,112 | +785 |
+| Features | 41 | 143 | +102 |
+| Bugs | 67 | 125 | +58 |
+| Epics | 89 | 141 | +52 |
+| Docs | 32 | 33 | +1 |
+| Subtasks | 36 | 36 | -- |
+
+### Priority distribution
+
+| Priority | Previous | This deploy | Delta |
+|----------|----------|-------------|-------|
+| P0 (Critical) | 43 | 233 | +190 |
+| P1 (High) | 515 | 877 | +362 |
+| P2 (Medium) | 852 | 1,208 | +356 |
+| P3 (Low) | 174 | 260 | +86 |
+| P4 (Backlog) | 8 | 12 | +4 |
+
+### New work streams
+
+- **OpenTUI import pipeline** -- the dominant new work area, adding hundreds of issues across ingestion, translation, IR, certification, alien-uplift, and benchmarking test suites. Top blocker `bd-3bxhj.4.10` (translation E2E script) gates 6 downstream issues.
+- **Pane accessibility** (`pane-a11y`) -- keyboard command model, focus graph semantics (`bd-21pbi.1`), screen-reader hardening (`bd-2vr05.7.3`).
+- **Pane performance** (`pane-perf`) -- profiling hotspots across core, terminal, and web drag paths (`bd-1y0ph`).
+
+### Project health shift
 
-- Massive issue expansion: nearly 1,000 new issues added across all categories, reflecting new work streams including OpenTUI import (translation, ingestion, certification), pane accessibility (`pane-a11y`), and pane performance (`pane-perf`).
 - Completion rate dropped from 99% to 92% due to the influx of new open/blocked work.
-- New health warning surfaced in README: "More issues are blocked than actionable."
-- Top priorities shifted from VFX optimization and FrankenTerm WASM to accessibility hardening (`bd-2vr05.7.3`) and OpenTUI import certification.
-- Critical bottlenecks now include 5 items (up from 1), with the top blocker (`bd-3bxhj.4.10`) gating 6 downstream issues.
-- `data/history.json` removed (was present only in the initial deployment).
-- Cache-bust version on static assets updated to `1772995263`.
+- Health warning surfaced: "More issues are blocked than actionable."
+- Critical bottlenecks grew from 1 to 5, with the largest (`bd-3bxhj.4.10`) blocking 6 items.
+- Velocity stabilized at ~108-573 closures/week (down from the initial 1,237/week peak).
+- Average days-to-close rose from 0.43 to 1.59, reflecting more complex issues.
+- New label categories appeared: `e2e`, `opentui-import`, `alien-graveyard`, `certification`, `accessibility`, `screen-reader`, `benchmarking`.
+
+### Static asset changes
+
+- Cache-bust version updated to `1772995263`.
+- `data/history.json` remains absent (removed in second deployment).

+The founding deployment that created the repository and established the live dashboard. Five commits over ~10 minutes set up the site and its GitHub Pages infrastructure.
+

 ### 2026-02-04 17:55 -- Initial site deployment
 
 **Commit:** [`cfeef48`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/cfeef487e793e80a58e6ad06af6edebbd5325034)
+**Branch:** `main` (orphan root commit)
 **Generated:** 2026-02-04T22:55:10Z by `bv --pages`
 
 This is the founding commit. 39 files, 42,324 lines of code.
 
 #### Architecture
 
-The site is a fully self-contained, offline-capable single-page application with no server-side component. All querying happens client-side via sql.js WASM against a chunked SQLite database reassembled in the browser.
+The site is a fully self-contained, offline-capable single-page application with no server-side component. All querying happens client-side via sql.js WASM against a chunked SQLite database reassembled in the browser. Cross-Origin Isolation is handled by a service worker to enable SharedArrayBuffer on GitHub Pages.
 
-#### Application modules (15,004 lines of custom JS)
+#### Application modules (15,912 lines of custom code)
 
 | File | Lines | Purpose |
 |------|-------|---------|
-| `index.html` | 4,134 | Main SPA shell with Alpine.js templating, Tailwind CSS styling, Mermaid diagram containers |
-| `viewer.js` | 3,510 | Core application: OPFS caching, chunk reassembly, FTS5 full-text search, materialized views, issue detail rendering |
-| `graph.js` | 3,847 | Force-directed dependency graph visualization with WASM-powered PageRank/centrality metrics, multiple view modes, Dracula theme |
-| `charts.js` | 761 | Interactive analytics dashboard: burndown/burnup progress, label dependency heatmap, priority distribution pie, type breakdown bar |
-| `styles.css` | 2,374 | Full stylesheet with dark/light mode, responsive layout, accessibility considerations |
-| `wasm_loader.js` | 154 | Lazy WASM module loader for hybrid scorer and graph analytics |
-| `hybrid_scorer.js` | 88 | Client-side graph-aware search ranking with 5 tunable presets (default, bug-hunting, sprint-planning, impact-first, text-only) |
+| `index.html` | 4,134 | Main SPA shell with Alpine.js templating, Tailwind CSS styling, Mermaid diagram containers, dark/light mode, mobile web-app meta tags, Content Security Policy |
+| `graph.js` | 3,847 | Force-directed dependency graph visualization with WASM-powered PageRank/centrality metrics, multiple view modes (status, priority, type), Dracula theme palette |
+| `viewer.js` | 3,510 | Core application: OPFS caching, chunk reassembly with SHA-256 integrity checks, FTS5 full-text search, materialized views, issue detail rendering, error diagnostics |
+| `styles.css` | 2,374 | Full stylesheet with dark/light mode, responsive layout, accessibility considerations, premium loading animations |
+| `graph-demo.html` | 863 | Standalone dependency graph demo page with JetBrains Mono font |
+| `charts.js` | 761 | Interactive analytics dashboard: burndown/burnup progress, label dependency heatmap, priority distribution pie, type breakdown bar (Chart.js) |
+| `wasm_loader.js` | 154 | Lazy WASM module loader for hybrid scorer and graph analytics with threshold gating (5,000 issues) |
+| `coi-serviceworker.js` | 136 | Cross-Origin Isolation service worker enabling SharedArrayBuffer for sql.js WASM on GitHub Pages (`credentialless` COEP policy) |
+| `hybrid_scorer.js` | 88 | Client-side graph-aware search ranking with 5 tunable presets (default, bug-hunting, sprint-planning, impact-first, text-only) combining text, PageRank, status, impact, priority, and recency signals |
 | `hybrid_scorer.test.js` | 45 | Unit tests for hybrid scorer |

@@ -198,17 +249,19 @@ beads-for-frankentui/
 
 ## Branch topology
 
-- `main` -- primary branch, target for `bv --pages` deployments
-- `master` -- mirror of `main` (force-pushed for compatibility)
-- `gh-pages` -- GitHub Pages deployment target (managed by Actions)
+All three `bv --pages` deployments are orphan commits (no parent). The initial deployment's branch accumulated four follow-up commits for Pages infrastructure, but the second and third deployments each replaced the tree wholesale.
+
+- `main` -- primary branch, target for `bv --pages` deployments (points to third deployment)
+- `master` -- points to the second deployment orphan commit
+- `gh-pages` -- GitHub Pages deployment target, points to the Pages workflow commit
 
 ## Deployment mechanism
 
-Each deployment is a full-tree orphan-style commit produced by `bv --pages` from the [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) tool (`bv`). The tool:
+Each deployment is a full-tree orphan commit produced by `bv --pages` from the [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) tool (`bv`). The tool:
 
 1. Reads the beads SQLite database for the target project
 2. Generates graph layouts, triage data, project health metrics, and a README
 3. Chunks the database into 1 MB binary segments with SHA-256 integrity hashes
 4. Bundles the viewer SPA with all vendored dependencies
-5. Commits everything and pushes to the target repository
+5. Commits everything as an orphan and force-pushes to the target repository
 6. GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/static.yml`) deploys the result to Pages
